introSection: Crazy Mouse (Korean: 크레이지 마우스) was an Interpark wild mouse roller coaster located at Children's Grand Park in Neung-dong, Songdong-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride operated at Suseong Land in Daegu, Daegu, South Korea until 2003.

The ride was relocated to Children's Grand Park in 2004 but remained standing but not operating until mid-2008, during which time work was performed on the cars and lift.

The ride closed in 2018.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse (Korean: 크레이지 마우스) was an Interpark wild mouse roller coaster located at Children's Grand Park in Neung-dong, Songdong-Gu, Seoul, South Korea.

The ride operated at Suseong Land in Daegu, Daegu, South Korea until 2003.

The ride was relocated to Children's Grand Park in 2004 but remained standing but not operating until mid-2008, during which time work was performed on the cars and lift.

The ride closed in 2018.
